haiku_tool_regressions: project.yml missing info block; pbxproj lacks GENERATE_INFOPLIST_FILE so xcodebuild build fails at bundle validation; StreakCalculatorImpl trips 3 swiftlint --strict errors (function_body_length 53>50, identifier_name 'i', implicit_optional_initialization); silent catch-fallback in streak+weekly swallows invariant violations
new_bugs_found: [I-2] silent-catch fallback in StreakCalculatorImpl.streak/weekly hides invariant violations; [I-3] current-streak backtrack capped at 365 days silently truncates longer streaks; [M-1] utcGregorian duplicated across DayKey and StreakCalculatorImpl
delta_vs_prod: Info.plist regression persists identically; 1C+3I vs prior 2C+3I — roughly equivalent quality, xcodebuild still red
notes: Prod config on fresh host reproduces the Haiku xcodegen Info.plist regression; strictly worse than sh-ios-d (which cleared xcodebuild)
